title: viburnum villosum var. villosum
intro: Viburnum villosum var. villosum, also known as the Bead Tree or Ezo-kazura, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Japan and Korea. The plant contains viburnine, a compound with medicinal properties that has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Viburnum villosum var. villosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Viburnum villosum var. villosum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult a medical professional before using any medicinal plant.
